skills.name: Echo Message
skills.description: Returns the provided message as-is. Serves as an example/template skill for the registry.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"message": {"type": "string", "description": "Message to echo back."}}}

skills.name: Checkout DB to Draft
skills.description: Retrieve a document from the database and save it to a local draft file in docs/drafts/.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"doc_title": {"type": "string", "description": "The title of the database document to checkout."}, "filename": {"type": "string", "description": "The filename to save as in docs/drafts/."}}, "required": ["doc_title", "filename"]}

skills.name: Cleanup Episodic Memory
skills.description: Applies time-to-live cleanup logic to older episodic memory rows based on retention configs.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Cleanup LLM Cache
skills.description: Applies time-to-live cleanup logic to older llm_cache rows to bound disk growth.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Commit Draft to DB
skills.description: Read a draft file from docs/drafts/ and save/publish it into the database document store.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"filename": {"type": "string", "description": "The draft filename in docs/drafts/."}, "doc_title": {"type": "string", "description": "The title of the document in the database."}, "tags": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "description": "Optional tags for the document."}, "purpose": {"type": "string", "enum": ["memory", "knowledge"], "description": "'memory' (default) for ephemeral notes, 'knowledge' for curated docs never pruned"}, "metadata": {"type": "object", "description": "Optional metadata (e.g. source URLs, confidence, versions)."}}, "required": ["filename", "doc_title"]}

skills.name: Consolidate Memories
skills.description: Trigger memory consolidation cycle to synthesize granular logs into high-level Primary Concepts.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Decay Self-Model
skills.description: Applies background time decay and drift to unpinned traits in the self-model.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Delete DB Document
skills.description: Delete a persistent document from the database document store.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"doc_title": {"type": "string", "description": "The title of the database document to delete."}}, "required": ["doc_title"]}

skills.name: Delete Draft File
skills.description: Delete a draft file from the docs/drafts/ directory.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"filename": {"type": "string", "description": "The name of the draft file to delete."}}, "required": ["filename"]}

skills.name: Document Memory
skills.description: Retrieve or list persistent documents stored in the Janus database.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"action": {"type": "string", "enum": ["get", "list"]}, "title": {"type": "string"}, "tag_filter": {"type": "string"}, "purpose": {"type": "string", "enum": ["memory", "knowledge"], "description": "Optional filter for action=list, restricting results to this purpose."}}, "required": ["action"]}

skills.name: Evaluate Drives
skills.description: Increments and evaluates system drives like boredom.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Evaluate Goals
skills.description: Applies background checking of active goals, transitioning them to completed when checkpoints are achieved.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Execute Code
skills.description: Compiles and executes Python code inside an isolated, AST-audited sandbox subprocess.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"code": {"type": "string", "description": "The raw Python code block to execute."}}, "required": ["code"]}

skills.name: Fetch URL
skills.description: Fetch and parse the text contents of a specific URL webpage.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"url": {"type": "string", "description": "The absolute HTTP or HTTPS URL to fetch."}}, "required": ["url"]}

skills.name: Ingest Fact
skills.description: Run a candidate fact through the 4-phase Epistemic Ingestion Pipeline (stage → triangulate → audit → assimilate into Neo4j).
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"fact_text": {"type": "string", "description": "The candidate fact to ingest."}, "source": {"type": "string", "description": "Origin label (e.g. web_research, manual)."}, "source_url": {"type": "string", "description": "Optional source URL."}, "metadata": {"type": "object", "description": "Optional extra metadata."}}, "required": ["fact_text"]}

skills.name: List Draft Files
skills.description: List all draft files currently in the docs/drafts/ directory.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Manage Sandbox
skills.description: Control git worktree sandboxes (actions: start, test, ship, abort).
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"action": {"type": "string", "enum": ["start", "test", "ship", "abort"], "description": "The sandbox action to perform."}, "session_name": {"type": "string", "description": "Optional branch/session name (required only for 'start')."}}, "required": ["action"]}

skills.name: Read Codebase
skills.description: Query the codebase index for relevant class structures, methods, signatures, and functions.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"query": {"type": "string", "description": "The code symbol (class name, function name, file name) or search phrase."}}, "required": ["query"]}

skills.name: Read Draft File
skills.description: Read the entire contents of a draft document in docs/drafts/.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"filename": {"type": "string", "description": "The name of the draft file to read."}}, "required": ["filename"]}

skills.name: Run Reflection Cycle
skills.description: Executes the autonomous multi-agent reflection and debate loop.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Scan Workspace
skills.description: Recursively scans the active workspace codebase, parses Python structures via AST, and indexes summaries into ChromaDB.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {}}

skills.name: Spawn Agent
skills.description: Register or update a helper agent in the swarm registry with a specific role and prompt.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"agent_id": {"type": "string", "description": "The unique identifier for the helper agent (lowercase alphanumeric)."}, "name": {"type": "string", "description": "The display name of the agent."}, "prompt": {"type": "string", "description": "The system prompt defining the agent's role and rules."}}, "required": ["agent_id", "name", "prompt"]}

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Perform a web search using a search query and retrieve a list of snippet results.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"query": {"type": "string", "description": "The search query term to look up."}}, "required": ["query"]}

skills.name: Write Draft File
skills.description: Write or update the contents of a draft document in docs/drafts/.
skills.parameters_schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"filename": {"type": "string", "description": "The name of the draft file to write (e.g., roadmap.md)."}, "content": {"type": "string", "description": "The full text content to write."}}, "required": ["filename", "content"]}
